use_cases: Displaying animated greeting messages with a typewriter effect
Creating attention-grabbing text reveals on landing pages
Adding subtle text animation to hero sections
Building animated headlines for marketing content
ai_summary: A lightweight text animation component that simulates a typewriter effect by revealing characters one at a time with a smooth opacity fade-in. Uses Framer Motion for the entrance animation and React hooks for the timed character reveal. Ideal for creating engaging headline animations in hero sections or landing pages.
